description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, octagonal base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white reflective stripes encircling its midsection, making it highly visible in urban environments. The surface of the cone shows signs of wear, with dirt and scuff marks especially near the base, indicating outdoor use. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base appears to be made of a heavier, possibly rubberized material, darker in color and textured for grip on pavement. No logos or text are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A tall orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, dark, octagonal base. The cone shows signs of outdoor wear and has no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a dark, worn base; some dirt is visible near the bottom.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, highlighting the same features with minor scuff marks more visible on the lower stripe.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, showing the cone's consistent color and wear, with the base's octagonal shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Final view, emphasizing the pointed tip and the textured, stable base; no additional markings are visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the middle and one closer to the base.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, thick, and dark-colored, likely made of rubber for stability and weight, with visible wear and dirt.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: The cone appears worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and some fading, indicating regular outdoor use.
